generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran who served during the Cold War, I've seen firsthand how preparedness keeps us safe. Our allies are cutting back on defense spending, and we can't afford to be left vulnerable. A strong draft system ensures we always have the manpower to defend our values. It's not just about duty—it's about security for our grandchildren. #NationalSecurity #DraftForSafety
